3303000.name: Combat Unleashed
3303000.description:
Martial Arts! Werewolves! Mayhem! Play as a Hardened Bounty Hunter in a dark fantasy world as you hunt down and arrest Vampire Lords, Werewolves, A Mad Scientist, Hordes of well trained soldiers, and monsters! 2 Playable characters, each with different powers and Stories to discover! Defeat Powerful bosses, collect new weapons, magic bullets, and collect new Telekinetic abilities to aid in your campaign of destruction and salvation! This 2.5D Metroidvania features tight retro Gameplay and Pre-rendered graphics inspired by some of the greatest games of the '90s, now in 1080i!

Every werewolf must be eliminated!

Play as a group of bounty hunters working for the police and thwart a Mad Scientist's plot to conquer the world from deep underground with the help of powerful vampire lords in this Gothic-Inspired Adventure. Start with only your power-armor and unlock every weapon and power-up in order to get to new areas on your adventure. Each Werewolf you encounter holds a new ability or weapon!

Meet the Bounty Hunters:

Xavier: An ancient warrior who has been revived for a special mission. A martial arts master who wields a broadsword and wears power-armor, a bad attitude, and has a penchant for destruction who has been hired by the police in a last dich effort after countless failures at arresting the mad scientist! He specializes in hand-to-hand combat, and has an extensive background as a prize fighter.

Fok: A member of a race of Monkey-men, He specializes in using psychic abilities for detective work. Before becoming a bounty hunter, he spent 10 years completely isolated in the mountains as he trained his psychic abilities. This is the biggest job of his life, and His psychic skills could mean the difference between finding the mad scientist and collecting the biggest paycheck of his life or nothing at all.
3303000.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
